twitter_thread: Schneider Electric spent $3.1 billion on Cognite, 10x its revenue. A bold bet on industrial AI.
Cognite's Data Fusion will boost Schneider's EcoStruxure platform, used by 10,000+ industrial sites.
Integration will take 12-18 months, with 500+ engineers working on the project.
Result: 30% increase in operational data capabilities, and 25% reduction in energy waste.
Cognite's AI will optimize Schneider's energy management systems, cutting costs by $100 million/yr.
Schneider's acquisition strategy: industrial AI and data analytics, with 5 deals in the last 2 years.
Have you implemented industrial AI in your energy management systems? #industrialai #energymgmt
pack.linkedin: Schneider Electric's $3.1 billion acquisition of Cognite will integrate Cognite's Data Fusion with Schneider's EcoStruxure platform, enhancing energy management systems for 10,000+ industrial sites. The deal aims to cut energy waste by 25% and costs by $100 million/yr. What's your take on the impact of industrial AI on energy management?
